Defs:
Gun_MunoLMG 缪诺突击轻机枪 一款缪诺中常用的轻机枪，它结构可靠，操作简单，被大规模的使用，发射中口径弹药，具有良好的杀伤效果和足够的侵彻能力，
Weapons/Gun_MunoLMG Graphic_Single 1.4
Interact_Rifle
68000 7.5 0.50 0.82 0.82 0.68 1.8
150 10
GasOperation
6
MunoRace_WorkBench
Verb_Shoot true Bullet_MunoLMG 1.2 35 12 4 Shot_Minigun GunTail_Medium 10
MunoGunMiddle
stock
Blunt
20 2.0
barrel
Blunt
Poke
20 2.0
Bullet_MunoLMG 缪诺轻机枪弹
Things/Projectile/Bullet_Small Graphic_Single
Bullet 10 70 0.1 0.39
Gun_Muno_PR 缪诺练习步枪 一款专为射击训练设计的轻型步枪，使用小口径弹药，后坐力低，易于操控。虽然威力有限，但精度可靠，是新手熟悉枪械的理想选择。
Weapons/Gun_Muno_PR Graphic_Single 1.4
Interact_Rifle
20000 3.5 0.70 0.85 0.75 0.55 1.1
80 8
Gunsmithing
3
MunoRace_WorkBench
Verb_Shoot true Bullet_Muno_PR 0.7 31 1 Shot_AssaultRifle GunTail_Light 6
MunoGunBasic
stock
Blunt
9 1.5
barrel
Blunt
Poke
9 1.5
Bullet_Muno_PR 小口径练习弹
Things/Projectile/Bullet_Small Graphic_Single
Bullet 11 55 0.3 0.10
Gun_SSR 缪诺简易射手步枪 在练习步枪基础上简单改进而成的精确射手武器，换装了望远瞄具。结构简单可靠，适合具备一定射击基础的士兵在中远距离执行精准打击任务。
Weapons/Gun_SSR Graphic_Single 1.4
Interact_Rifle
55000 4.0 0.45 0.80 0.88 0.82 1.3
140 14 5
Gunsmithing
5
MunoRace_WorkBench
Verb_Shoot true Bullet_SSR 1.2 37 1 Shot_BoltActionRifle GunTail_Medium 9
MunoGunBasic
stock
Blunt
13 2.0
barrel
Blunt
Poke
13 2.0
Bullet_SSR 小口径狙击弹
Things/Projectile/Bullet_Small Graphic_Single
Bullet 11 70 0.7 0.10
!-- 精准射手步枪 -->
Gun_SR 缪诺精准射手步枪 军用规格的半自动精确射手步枪，搭配全威力弹药和高倍率电子光学瞄具。在保持精准度的同时提供半自动射击能力，是缪诺军械库中平衡射速与精度的枪械。
Weapons/Gun_SR Graphic_Single 1.4
Interact_Rifle
90000 5.5 0.55 0.85 0.90 0.85 1.1
200 20 12
Gunsmithing
6
MunoRace_WorkBench
Verb_Shoot true Bullet_SR 1.0 40 1 Shot_BoltActionRifle GunTail_Medium 10
MunoGunAdvanced
stock
Blunt
15 1.8
barrel
Blunt
Poke
15 1.8
Bullet_SR 全威力弹
Things/Projectile/Bullet_Small Graphic_Single
Bullet 18 75 0.8 0.22
Gun_MunoAR 缪诺突击步枪 一款中口径电磁突击步枪，对于缪诺们来说，后坐力可控，且拥有更高的精度和穿甲能力，代价是比较昂贵
Weapons/Gun_MunoAR Graphic_Single 1.4
Interact_Rifle
80000 5 0.68 0.85 0.78 0.68 1.3
120 14
GasOperation
6
MunoRace_WorkBench
Verb_Shoot true Bullet_MunoAR 1.2 32 3 7 Shot_AssaultRifle GunTail_Medium 9
MunoGunMiddle
stock
Blunt
20 2.0
barrel
Blunt
Poke
20 2.0
Bullet_MunoAR 缪诺突击步枪弹
Things/Projectile/Bullet_Small Graphic_Single
Bullet 14 70
0.26
Gun_MunoSR 缪诺战略步枪 一款由老款步枪与榴弹发射器的组合式步枪，拥有独特的组合式火力，但体积和重量都比较大。
Weapons/Gun_MunoSR Graphic_Single 1.4
Interact_Rifle
80000 5 0.68 0.85 0.78 0.68 1.3
120 14
GasOperation
6
MunoRace_WorkBench

Blunt

barrel

Poke
20 2.0

Things/Projectile/Bullet_Small Graphic_Single
Bullet 14 70
0.26
Gun_MunoHPP 缪诺大威力手枪 一款紧凑的大口径的大威力手枪，停止力很强，但是精度不如人意
Weapons/Gun_MunoHPP Graphic_Single 0.7
Interact_Rifle
24000 2.5 0.78 0.82 0.55 0.28 1.0
120 6
GasOperation
6
MunoRace_WorkBench

MunoGunMiddle
grip
Blunt
20 2.0
barrel
Blunt
Poke
20 2.0
Bullet_MunoHPP 缪诺大威力手枪弹
Things/Projectile/Bullet_Small Graphic_Single
Bullet 17 55 1.0 0.16
Gun_MunoPO 缪诺手枪 一款小口径电磁手枪，以手枪的角度来说，它穿甲能力很不错，但弹药杀伤能力不足
Weapons/Gun_MunoPO Graphic_Single 0.7
Interact_Rifle
48000 2 0.90 0.75 0.48 0.35 1.0
150 8
GasOperation
6
MunoRace_WorkBench
Verb_Shoot true Bullet_MunoPO 0.2 23 1 1 Shot_Autopistol GunTail_Medium 8
MunoGunMiddle
grip
Blunt
20 2.0
barrel
Blunt
Poke
20 2.0
Bullet_MunoPO 奶牛娘手枪弹
Things/Projectile/Bullet_Small Graphic_Single
Bullet 8 60
0.37
Gun_MunoMP 缪诺冲锋手枪 一款射速极快的小口径冲锋手枪，快到能在1秒内清空弹匣，但极高射速带来的较低的操控性和精准度
Weapons/Gun_MunoMP Graphic_Single 0.7
Interact_Rifle
48000 2 0.86 0.70 0.52 0.22 1.0
150 8
GasOperation
6
MunoRace_WorkBench
Verb_Shoot true Bullet_MunoMP 0.6 23 4 3.2 Shot_Machinepistol GunTail_Light 8
MunoGunMiddle
grip
Blunt
20 2.0
barrel
Blunt
Poke
20 2.0
Bullet_MunoMP 奶牛娘电磁手枪弹
Things/Projectile/Bullet_Small Graphic_Single
Bullet 8 60
0.17
Gun_MunoMGL 缪诺榴弹发射器 弹匣供弹的榴弹发射器，虽然使用的榴弹口径较小，但射速弥补了单发杀伤力不足的问题
Weapons/Gun_MunoMGL Graphic_Single 2.0
Interact_Rifle
120000 11.5 0.48 0.80 0.65 0.45 2.2
320 40
75
GasOperation
7
MunoRace_WorkBench
Verb_Shoot true Bullet_MunoMGL 1.8 25 3 10 0.2 ChargeLance_Fire GunTail_Medium 12
MunoGunAdvanced
stock
Blunt
20 2.0
barrel
Blunt
Poke
20 2.0
Bullet_MunoMGL 奶牛娘榴弹
Weapons/Gun_MilkGL_proj Graphic_Single
Projectile_Explosive
Bomb 1 75 1 1.0 15 0.26
Gun_MunoHMG 缪诺重机枪 一款大口径重机枪，兼具大威力与高穿甲，但是非常笨重
Weapons/Gun_MunoHMG Graphic_Single 2.0
Interact_Rifle
120000 21 0.35 0.72 0.66 0.56 2.0
320 40
GasOperation
6
MunoRace_WorkBench

MunoGunAdvanced
stock
Blunt
20 2.0
barrel
Blunt
Poke
20 2.0
Bullet_MunoHMG 奶牛娘重机枪弹
Things/Projectile/Bullet_Small Graphic_Single
Bullet 20 70 0.5 0.29
Gun_MunoRAMR 缪诺电磁反器材步枪 一款电磁驱动的反器材步枪，发射高速钨芯弹丸，拥有极高的穿甲能力和毁灭性的单发伤害。但极其沉重，开火前需要长时间充能，近身几乎无法瞄准。
Weapons/Gun_MunoRAMR Graphic_Single 1.4
Interact_Rifle
180000 28 0.20 0.75 0.85 0.90 1.75
400 30 50 2 20
GasOperation
8
MunoRace_WorkBench
Verb_Shoot true Bullet_MunoRAMR 2.5 45 1 Shot_SniperRifle GunTail_Heavy 16
MunoGunAdvanced
stock
Blunt
22 2.5
barrel
Blunt
Poke
22 2.5
Bullet_MunoRAMR 钨芯电磁弹
Things/Projectile/Bullet_Small Graphic_Single
Bullet 65 120 1.5 0.75
Gun_MunoAC 缪诺机炮 一款大口径双管机枪，可以提供更强的火力，而且极具弹药灵活性，唯一问题是非常笨重
Weapons/Gun_AC Graphic_Single 2.0
Interact_Rifle
120000 21 0.35 0.72 0.66 0.56 2.0
320 40

6

Projectile_Explosive
Bomb 1 75 1 1.0 15 0.26
Bullet_MunoAC_Gel 化合粘胶弹
Weapons/Gun_AC_Gel_proj Graphic_Single 1.15
MunoRaceLib.MunoComp.Projectile_GalactogenGel
Extinguish 3 54 1 1.0 0 0 Filth_FireFoam 1 ExtinguisherPuffSmall Foam_Impact
Gun_MunoRGL 缪诺火箭榴弹发射器 一款弹匣供弹的火箭榴弹发射器，凭借独特的弹药设计，维持威力的同时降低了枪械重量，操作性也更高了
Weapons/Gun_MunoRGL Graphic_Single 1.4
Interact_Rifle
120000 11.5 0.48 0.80 0.65 0.45 2.2
320 40
75

MunoGunAdvanced

barrel

Poke
20 2.0
Bullet_MunoRGL 奶牛娘火箭榴弹
Weapons/Gun_MilkRGL_proj Graphic_Single
Projectile_Explosive
Bomb 1 75 1 1.0 15 0.26
Gun_MunoLR 缪诺激光步枪 发射伽玛激光束的步枪，可以穿透几乎所有装甲，能够非常有效的对付各种有机体目标，但对高密度结构伤害有限
Weapons/Gun_MunoLR Graphic_Single 1.4
Interact_Rifle
RangedHeavy
Ultratech
90000 13 0.72 0.78 0.72 0.66 1.6
100 30 4
BeamWeapons

220
Spacer

WeaponBeamRepeater

barrels
Blunt
20 2
stock
Blunt
20 2

Things/Projectile/Bullet_Small Graphic_Single
BeamBypassShields 13 Mote_BeamRepeaterLaser 0.1 0.66
Gun_MunoLSR 缪诺激光狙击枪 既然实体弹药充满了不稳定性，为什么不使用激光呢，这把激光狙击枪就这么诞生了

RangedHeavy

Gun_MunoLPO 缪诺激光手枪 发射伽玛激光束的手枪，因体积限制功率较低，但体型小巧上手难度低，适合那些打不准的人使用

RangedHeavy

BeamBypassShields 13 Mote_BeamRepeaterLaser 0.1 0.66
Gun_MunoLC 缪诺激光炮 发射伽玛激光束的激光炮，功率极高，适合对抗体型更大的有机体，但同样的不适合对付高密度结构
